channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran submits peace proposal seeking war reparations and US troop withdrawal
item.description: Tehran has presented a peace proposal to the United States that includes ending hostilities across the region, withdrawal of US forces from areas near Iran, and reparations for war damage, as diplomatic efforts continue to de-escalate the conflict.

item.title: ☢️ Russia launches major nuclear forces drills amid Ukraine conflict escalation
item.description: Russia began three days of nuclear exercises involving 64,000 troops, over 200 missile launchers, and 140 aircraft. The drills come as Putin visits China and Ukraine steps up drone attacks on Russian territory.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian medium-range drone strikes deal double blow to Russian war effort
item.description: Ukrainian mid-range drone attacks are increasingly targeting Russian oil refineries and disrupting ground offensives, presenting growing challenges to Moscow's military operations and logistics.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan premier warns China is greatest source of regional instability
item.description: Taiwan's Premier Cho Jung-tai stated that China's ongoing military activities near the island are the primary source of regional unease, as the defense ministry reports fresh Chinese military exercises nearby.

item.title: 🛢️ US Strategic Petroleum Reserve hits two-year low after record draw
item.description: A record 9.9 million barrels were withdrawn from the US emergency oil reserve last week, pushing total volumes to approximately 374 million barrels, the lowest level since July 2024, amid heightened energy market volatility.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran parliament to vote on €50 million bounty for Trump and Netanyahu
item.description: Iran's National Security Council chairman announced a bill offering rewards for killing US President Trump, Israeli PM Netanyahu, and CENTCOM commander Cooper, calling it "reciprocal action" for the assassination of former Supreme Leader Khamenei.

item.title: 💥 Explosions heard on Qeshm Island in strategic Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Explosions were reported on Qeshm Island between the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz, with air defenses activated amid heightened tensions following US warnings of possible strikes.

item.title: 🇮🇱 IDF destroys 60% of Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon
item.description: A senior IDF Northern Command officer said Israeli forces have destroyed 60% of Hezbollah terror infrastructure across 600 square kilometers in 63 villages within the Forward Defense Line zone.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO Jet Shoots Down Drone Over Estonia, Baltic Security Heightened
item.description: A NATO fighter jet shot down a reported stray Ukrainian drone over Estonia, according to the Estonian defense minister. The incident highlights growing concerns about airspace security in the Baltic region amid the ongoing Russia-Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇳🇬 Gunmen Abduct 39 Students and 7 Teachers in Nigeria School Attacks
item.description: Armed gunmen kidnapped 39 students and 7 teachers in coordinated attacks targeting a secondary school and two primary schools in Nigeria. Children aged between two and 16 were among those abducted in the latest mass kidnapping.

item.title: 🇸🇪🇫🇷⚓ Sweden to Buy Navy Frigates From France for Over $4 Billion to Boost Baltic Defence
item.description: Sweden will order four navy frigates from Frances Naval Group in a major deal that will triple its air defence capacity. The new NATO member focuses on security threats in the Baltic Sea amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🇪🇪✈️ NATO Jet Shoots Down Suspected Drone in Estonia Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: A NATO aircraft shot down a suspected drone in Estonia, the latest in a series of airspace violations in the region amid frequent Ukrainian attacks on Russia.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦 Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant Reaching Point of No Return, Rosatom Head Warns
item.description: The situation around the Russian-held Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant in Ukraine is reaching a critical point due to increased Ukrainian attacks in the area, according to the head of Russias state nuclear corporation.

item.title: 🇵🇱🇺🇸 Polish PM Urges Transatlantic Unity After Pentagon Cancels Troop Deployment
item.description: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk stressed the importance of ties with Washington after the Pentagon cancelled plans to deploy 4,000 U.S.-based troops to Poland, calling for transatlantic unity to survive a difficult period.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese aircraft carrier conducts live-fire drills in Western Pacific
item.description: The Liaoning carrier group is holding exercises months after a stand-off with Japanese fighter jets, highlighting rising military tensions in the region.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Türkiye detains 110 suspects in nationwide ISIS crackdown
item.description: Counterterrorism police captured 110 suspects across Istanbul and other cities in operations targeting Daesh recruitment networks.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesian rupiah plunges to record low as markets reel
item.description: The Indonesian currency hit an all-time low amid economic pressures, with critics warning of impact on import-dependent citizens.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iranian civilians receive assault rifle training amid war fears
item.description: Groups of Iranians are learning to use AK-47 rifles from Revolutionary Guard instructors in central Tehran as domestic preparedness efforts intensify.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺⚔️ Chinese-trained Russian soldiers return to fight in Ukraine
item.description: European intelligence agencies report that China secretly trained around 200 Russian military personnel late last year, with some now fighting in Ukraine—a significant escalation in Beijing-Moscow military cooperation.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺💥 Russia strikes Ukrainian Danube port as drones target Moscow
item.description: Russia attacked Izmail, Ukraine's largest Danube port, while Ukraine launched drone strikes toward Moscow—escalating cross-border attacks as the war enters a new phase.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇨🇳💰 Russian rouble hits three-year high against yuan before Putin visit
item.description: The Russian rouble strengthened to its highest level against China's yuan since February 2023 ahead of President Putin's visit to Beijing with new business deals on the agenda.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇺🇸🛡️ Taiwan cautiously optimistic on US arms sales
item.description: Taiwan's defence minister expressed cautious optimism about US arms sales, after Trump said he was still considering whether to proceed with new weapons sales to the Chinese-claimed island.

item.title: 🦠🇨🇩 Ebola deaths in eastern Congo rise to 131 as outbreak spreads
item.description: Twenty-six more suspected Ebola deaths were recorded in 24 hours in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, bringing the death toll to 131, as the WHO chief expressed deep concern about the outbreak's speed and scale.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Russian missile and drone strikes kill four in Ukraine's northern regions
item.description: Russian ballistic missile and drone strikes killed four people and injured several others in Ukraine's northern Chernihiv and Sumy regions, according to Ukrainian officials, as attacks continued on multiple fronts.

item.title: 📈🛢️ Global stocks and bonds steady as oil prices ease on Trump Iran comments
item.description: Global markets stabilized after President Trump paused a planned attack on Iran and said there was a good chance of reaching a nuclear deal, sending oil prices lower and calming investor concerns about escalating Middle East tensions.
